NWS STORM SURVEY FOUND AN EF1 TORNADO THAT BEGAN NEAR AYSHIRE ROAD AND EBENEZER ROAD. THE TORNADO CONTINUED TO MOVE SOUTHEAST ALONG EBENEZER ROAD AND THEN TURNED RIGHT NEAR POND ROAD. THE TORNADO CONTINUED ALONG EBENEZER ROAD TOWARD DUNCAN CHAPEL ROAD. THERE WERE SEVERAL TREES DOWNED ON HOMES AND POWER LINES DOWNED. SEVERAL TREES WERE ALSO SNAPPED OFF IN THE PATH OF THE TORNADO. THE PATH WAS APPROXIMATELY 2 1/4 MILES LONG. MAXIMUM ESTIMATED WINDS WERE AROUND 100 MPH.
